## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content progress, performance, and strategic planning for website pages.](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track; no major issues identified in feedback](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Significant increase in impressions for new content; clicks expected to follow](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Opportunity to enrich "roles" pages with targeted, useful content for educators](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Need to develop strategy for handling "spaces" pages, including indexing controls](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Feedback

  - [Second batch of content staged in Framer for review](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [No major thematic issues identified in feedback](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Minor edits mostly related to wording or semantics](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Casey (educator) has reviewed 10 articles with minimal feedback](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Nikki to flag any emerging themes from Casey's comments](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

### Roles and Spaces Pages

  - [112 empty "roles" pages identified as opportunity for content expansion](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Differentiation needed between roles and spaces pages](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Roles pages (e.g., "high school drama teachers") could be programmatically built out with useful, targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Spaces pages require strategy for handling existing pages and controlling future indexing](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Nikki to discuss with product team about preventing new spaces from being indexed](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)

### Performance Reporting

  - [Looker Studio performance reporting system showing increased impressions](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Clicks expected to follow as content matures](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Report provides insights on queries, categories, and content performance](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Can be used to inform content strategy and topic focus](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)

### Content Tone and Voice

  - [Nikki upgraded to Grammarly with brand voice settings](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Brand director has created prompts for AI to understand brand voice and user personas](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Nikki to share additional brand voice documentation to refine content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jenn to send new articles and topic suggestions by end of day tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

  - [Nikki to investigate options for controlling indexing of new spaces pages](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring performance reports as content matures](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Nikki to gather and share any additional feedback from educator team](https://fathom.video/share/NxpsEuhR8nSVdhu6yzLphPNmUC4bCiyr?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
